name: marketing
description: 28 marketing skills across two disciplines — end-to-end brand creation (identity, guidelines, target audience, competitor analysis, logo brief, colour palette, design tokens, legal disclaimers, website copy) and end-to-end SEO (keyword research + list development + clustering/mapping, SERP & competitor analysis, on-page + technical + Core Web Vitals audits, backlinks, broken-link & redirect mapping, internal linking, content briefs + gap analysis, schema/structured-data + entity modelling, local SEO). SEO credentials via a single plaintext credentials.json.
